narrative:
Hebron Village (precinct in Licking County) has 1,807 registered voters, with 60.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.4%, a clear Republican lean of 10.9 percentage points.
